where_to_eat.name: A Twosome Place
where_to_eat.description: A cafe chain located in Jongno District (201-1 종로) where visitors can experience local Seoul cafe culture. Note that English may not be widely spoken here, so having a translation app handy is recommended.

where_to_eat.name: Late Night Food Spots
where_to_eat.description: Seoul is known for its vibrant late-night food scene blending traditional and modern cuisine. The city offers excellent dining options that operate well into the evening, perfect for experiencing local food culture.

into_the_wild.name: Han River Park (Hangang Park)
into_the_wild.description: A scenic riverside park where locals relax by the water. The Han River flows through the heart of Seoul, and the park offers a peaceful escape from the busy city with beautiful sunset views.

into_the_wild.name: Yeouido Hangang Park
into_the_wild.description: Located in the Yeongdeungpo area, this park is part of Seoul's extensive green spaces that provide a relaxing environment for walking and enjoying nature within the city.

into_the_wild.name: Yeouido Saetgang Ecological Park
into_the_wild.description: A quiet, peaceful natural space just a five-minute walk from Yeongdeungpo hotels. This ecological park showcases Seoul's commitment to maintaining green spaces throughout the dense city.

into_the_wild.name: Inwangsan Trail
into_the_wild.description: A hiking trail in Seoul that offers outdoor exploration and natural scenery. The trail is accessible and provides a good escape into nature from the urban environment.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Gwanghwamun Square in Winter
gram_worthy_spots.description: A stunning location that becomes a winter masterpiece when snow falls, creating beautiful photogenic moments. The square transforms into a scenic backdrop for photography throughout the seasons.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Han River Sunset Views
gram_worthy_spots.description: Iconic sunset photography spot along the Han River with beautiful golden hour lighting. This location captures Seoul's blend of natural beauty and urban landscape.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Seoul Neon-Lit Streets
gram_worthy_spots.description: Purple-tinted alleyways and neon-lit streets create cyberpunk-inspired photography opportunities throughout Seoul's neighborhoods. These heavily atmospheric areas are popular for moody night photography.

gram_worthy_spots.name: A Convenience Store Near Inwangsan
gram_worthy_spots.description: A 7/11 convenience store that has become a viral photo spot on social media, located next to the start of the Inwangsan trail. It's become a popular Instagram location despite being an unconventional subject.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Yeongdeungpo District
off_the_beaten_path.description: A less touristy area with cheap hotels and quiet green spaces. This neighborhood offers a more authentic local experience away from Seoul's main tourist routes.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Seoul Neighborhood Wandering
off_the_beaten_path.description: Exploring Seoul's various neighborhoods on foot reveals the city's seamless blend of centuries-old palaces and futuristic buildings. Getting lost in different areas provides authentic local encounters.
